As Hale prepared to delve deeper into the mystery surrounding Eleanor's death, he felt a sense of urgency building. The truth was within reach, but the tangled web of emotions and secrets threatened to ensnare them all.

As they left the study, the weight of their shared secrets began to lift, replaced by a sense of purpose. The clock's hands may have been frozen, but Hale felt a renewed determination to unravel the mysteries surrounding

As the final echoes of the clock's chime faded into silence, Hale stepped back, allowing the weight of the moment to settle. The truth had been laid bare, and Dr. Finch stood before him, a man trapped by his own choices.
